person.name: Ralph Bassett I
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
From Medieval Lands:
RALPH Basset, son of RICHARD Basset & his wife Matilda Ridel (-1160).  "Radulfus Basset filius Ricardi Basset" confirmed the donation of "terram de Niwebold…de feodo de Colestona" to Eynsham abbey made by "Radulfus Basset auus meus" by charter dated to [1144/63], witnessed by "Ricardus abbas Legrec, Robertus frater eius, Adel uxor mea, Thomas de Sais et Willelmus et Robertus filii eius…"[555].  "Galfridus Ridel" granted Colston "de feodo meo quæ fuit Gevæ Ridel avæ nostræ…Draituna", which "Radulfus Basset avus meus et Ricardus Basset pater noster" had granted, to "Radulfo Basset fratri meo", as well as other grants naming "Matildis Ridel matris meæ", by charter dated to [1150][556].  Henry II King of England confirmed the property of Eynsham abbey, including the donations by "Gisleberti Basset decimam de Stratona…Radulfi Basset decimam…de Estlaia" by charter dated 20 Dec [1159/61][557].  Military fee certifications in the Red Book of the Exchequer, in 1166, record that "Radulfus Basset" used to hold one knight’s fee from the abbot of Glastonbury in Somerset "tempore Regis Henrici" (presumably indicating King Henry I) now held by "hæres Radulfi Basset junioris"[558].  The 1163/64 Pipe Roll records that "Wills Basset…ipsi Willo" made payment "p debito Rad fris sui" in Leicestershire[559]. 

[m ---.  Military fee certifications in the Red Book of the Exchequer, in 1166, record that "uxor Radulfi Bassat" held "viii carucatas de dote sua in Rakendale et in Wileis" from "Galfridi Ridel" in Northamptonshire[560].] 

m ALICE, daughter of ---.  “Radulfus Basset” donated property to Canwell priory, for the souls of “Aliciæ uxoris meæ et filiorum meorum”, by undated charter, witnessed by "…Willielmo Basset…"[561].  "Radulfus Basset filius Ricardi Basset" confirmed the donation of "terram de Niwebold…de feodo de Colestona" to Eynsham abbey made by "Radulfus Basset auus meus" by charter dated to [1144/63], witnessed by "…Adel uxor mea…"[562]. 

Ralph & his wife had one child: 
1.         RALPH Basset (-1211). 

[Source: The Medieval Lands Project, "RALPH Basset", retrieved 2 October 2018, dvmansur; see link in Sources.]

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Bassett I於大約1131年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓時，他的父親Richard Basset38歲，母親Matilda Ridel35歲。他於大約1154年與Alice Peverel在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1160年1月1日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾可爾斯東 巴塞特享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Bassett I was born about 1131, in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Basset, was 38 and his mother, Matilda Ridel, was 35. He married Alice Peverel about 1154, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 1 January 1160, in Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30, and was buried in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Bassett I est né environ 1131, à Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Basset, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Matilda Ridel, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Alice Peverel environ 1154, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1160, à Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Market Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Bassett I um 1131 in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Basset 38 und seine Mutter Matilda Ridel 35. Er hat um 1154 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Peverel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 1. Januar 1160 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Bassett I è nato il circa 1131 nel Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Basset, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Ridel, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Alice Peverel circa 1154, nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 gennaio 1160, nel Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassett Iが約1131年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアペンクリッジドレイトンで生まれた時，父Richard Bassetは38歳，母Matilda Ridelは35歳であった。約1154年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットでAlice Peverelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1160年1月1日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアコルストン バセットで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアマーケト ドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassett I(이)가 대략 1131년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 펜크리지 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Basset(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Ridel(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 Alice Peverel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1160년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 콜스턴 배싯에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마크트 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Bassett I nasceu aproximadamente 1131, em Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Basset, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Ridel, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Peverel aproximadamente 1154, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1160, em Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Bassett I родился около 1131 г. в местности дреитон, пенкридж, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Basset было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Ridel, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Peverel около 1154 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 1 января 1160 г. в местности колстон бассетт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности маркет дреитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Bassett I nació aproximadamente 1131, en Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Basset, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Matilda Ridel, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Alice Peverel aproximadamente 1154, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de enero de 1160, en Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
